# Reconstruction Matrix

<!-- Generated by tools/check_status.py --write-matrix. Do not edit. -->

Progress of the FA reconstruction programs вЂ” the
[FA.EXE program](../roadmap.md#program-complete-faexe-reconstruction) (epic [#209](https://github.com/jomkz/fighters-codex/issues/209))
and the [overlay-binary program](../roadmap.md#program-overlay-reconstruction) (epic [#247](https://github.com/jomkz/fighters-codex/issues/247))
вЂ” one section per binary, one row per subsystem, generated from the
[symbol database](https://github.com/jomkz/fighters-codex/blob/main/db/README.md) and verified against the committed per-binary
Ghidra inventory by CI (`--check`).
